title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 151.290 - Fee to county clerk for making railroad tax book
text:
151.290.  Fee to county clerk for making railroad tax book. — The county clerk shall be allowed fees at the same rate for making out the railroad tax book as he may receive for like services in making out tax books under the general revenue law of the state.
(RSMo 1939 § 11276, A.L. 1945 p. 1825 § 33, A.L. 1945 p. 1952) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10046; 1919 § 13048; 1909 § 11600
